playercontrolpp.gui.title: PlayerControl++ Config
playercontrolpp.hotkey.auto_forward.name: Auto Forward
playercontrolpp.hotkey.auto_forward.comm: Toggle auto forward movement. When enabled, the player will continuously move forward.
playercontrolpp.hotkey.quick_turn.name: Quick Turn
playercontrolpp.hotkey.quick_turn.commen: Quick turn by the configured angle. Instant rotational snap.
playercontrolpp.setting.turn_angle.name: Turn Angle
playercontrolpp.setting.turn_angle.comme: Turn angle in degrees for Quick Turn. Common values: 90, 180, 270.
